## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Risk

- Does this affect key handling, recovery, mount logic, temporary images, or state files?
- Does this change compatibility or user workflow?

## Validation

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go build ./...`
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Real-device or acceptance validation described if relevant

## Notes

- Any follow-up work
- Any remaining limitations or caveats
